name: Form Memory Store
description: Stores and retrieves user-approved reusable memory cards for Form Memory Filler.
_comment: Node.js Tool Executa for Form Memory Filler. Run with the package entrypoint `node src/main.js`. Replace tool_id with the server-minted Anna Tool ID before app manifest wiring. APS capability is declared by the runtime Tool manifest returned from src/main.js describe/initialize, following official storage examples; do not store raw source documents.
